name: agentskillshub
description: Search, audit, and install 117K+ AI agent skills & MCP servers — every result carries a security grade checked BEFORE installing.
long_description: Skill discovery with a trust signal built in. Search a catalog of 117K+ open-source AI agent skills & MCP servers (quality subset ~22K), get a free basic security audit (SAFE/CAUTION/UNSAFE/REJECT/UNAUDITED + red flags), and fetch install commands. All lookups run against a static CDN index cached locally — fast, offline-capable, zero backend load.

tools.name: search_skills
tools.description: Natural-language search with filters; results include security_grade + estimated token cost

tools.name: audit_skill
tools.description: Free basic trust check: security grade, red flags, plain-English verdict

tools.name: get_skill_install
tools.description: Install commands per runtime + check-before-you-install safety line
